name: io.github.NeoAIResearch/neo-mcp
title: Neo — AI/ML Engineering
description: AI/ML engineering MCP server for Neo — submit tasks, track execution, and retrieve outputs.

environmentVariables.name: NEO_SECRET_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your Neo API secret key (starts with sk-v1-). Get one at https://heyneo.com.

environmentVariables.name: NEO_WORKSPACE_DIR
environmentVariables.description: Absolute path to your project/git root where Neo writes files. Required for Postman and recommended for all clients.
